description: Prediction market competitor tracking. Updated on each RESEARCH scan.

entities.name: Polymarket

metrics.note_2026_03_29: Kalshi overtook Polymarket on weekly volume this week ($3.4B Kalshi vs $2.5B Polymarket). First time Polymarket has been #2 on weekly volume.

recent_developments.event: Taker fee expansion to 8 new categories (finance, politics, culture). Projecting $800K-$1M daily revenue.
Acquired Brahma (DeFi settlement infra, $1B+ tx processed). Phasing out existing products in 30 days.
Acquired Dome (cross-platform prediction market API, YC Fall 2025, $5.2M raised). Now Polymarket-exclusive.

entities.competitive_position: dominant, 43% market share, moving aggressively on monetization and institutional integration
entities.threat_to_lever: Primary oracle source. If Polymarket delists categories under DEATH BETS Act or CFTC pressure, LEVER loses price feeds for those markets.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: Taker fee expansion makes Polymarket more expensive. Fee-sensitive traders may migrate to lower-cost platforms.

entities.name: Kalshi

recent_developments.event: Kinetic Markets LLC (Kalshi affiliate) registered by NFA as FCM, enabling margin trading for institutional clients. Still needs CFTC rulebook approval.
Washington state sued Kalshi alleging illegal gambling.
ARK Invest partnership: integrates Kalshi data for portfolio hedging and risk management workflows.
Valuation jumped from $11B to $22B on $1B+ Series E (Sequoia, CapitalG, ARK Venture Fund).
Arizona AG filed criminal charges for illegal gambling (first-ever criminal charges against a prediction market).

entities.competitive_position: TradFi-native, CFTC-regulated, moving into margin trading for institutions. Valuation at $22B signals winner-take-most positioning in TradFi prediction markets.
entities.threat_to_lever: Kalshi offering institutional leverage on prediction markets validates the market, but competes for institutional LP capital. Their Kinetic Markets FCM model is different from DeFi-native leverage.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: LEVER is DeFi-native, permissionless, 24/7, 50x leverage vs Kalshi's margin collateral model. Different user segments (DeFi natives vs TradFi institutions). Fundraising narrative: LEVER is what Kalshi is for DeFi.

entities.name: Azuro

recent_developments.event: Unified LiquidityTree pool reducing fragmentation across markets. Top Polygon revenue protocol.

entities.competitive_position: infrastructure layer, not a direct consumer platform
entities.opportunity_for_lever: infrastructure integration if Azuro adds LEVER as a leverage layer

entities.name: Ultramarkets
entities.competitive_position: DIRECT LEVER COMPETITOR. Same thesis: leverage on prediction markets. Weaker implementation: 10x max vs LEVER's 50x, binary auto-close vs continuous risk curves.
entities.threat_to_lever: high - only known direct competitor for leveraged prediction market positions
entities.opportunity_for_lever: LEVER has superior architecture (50x, ERC-4626, continuous risk curves, deterministic fee split). Need to get to market before Ultramarkets gains traction.

entities.name: Limitless Exchange
entities.competitive_position: Largest prediction market on Base (same chain as LEVER). Short-term binary options, not leveraged positions.
entities.threat_to_lever: Adjacent. If they add leverage, becomes direct competitor. Coinbase Ventures backing is significant.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: Potential oracle source or integration target. LEVER could offer leveraged positions on Limitless markets.

entities.name: Opinion
entities.competitive_position: Primary BNB Chain prediction market. Points system model. YZi Labs (Binance) backed.
entities.threat_to_lever: XMarket competitor on BNB Chain. Much larger volume. YZi Labs backing gives ecosystem advantages.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: XMarket's creator revenue share (50%) and CLOB model differentiates from Opinion's points model.

entities.name: 5cc Capital

metrics.focus: data tools, liquidity provision, compliance, infrastructure

recent_developments.event: Announced. Backed by Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan, Kalshi CEO Tarek Mansour, Marc Andreessen (via Moneta Luna), Ribbit Capital's Micky Malka, Millennium Management PM.

entities.competitive_position: First dedicated prediction market VC fund. Infrastructure focus.
entities.threat_to_lever: Will fund competitors in prediction market infrastructure space.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: DIRECT INVESTOR PITCH TARGET. LEVER is infrastructure, exactly what 5cc Capital backs. Reach out to Adhi Rajaprabhakaran and Noah Zingler-Sternig.
